scripts.check: node scripts/run-local-node.mjs scripts/check-js-syntax.mjs src tests scripts
scripts.lint: node scripts/run-local-node.mjs scripts/check-js-syntax.mjs src tests scripts
scripts.test: node scripts/run-local-node.mjs --test tests/unit/defaultRuntimeContract.test.js tests/unit/lazyList.test.js tests/unit/googleAdsMobileApi.test.js && node scripts/run-local-node.mjs tests/routes.smoke.js
scripts.test:e2e: node scripts/run-local-node.mjs node_modules/@playwright/test/cli.js test tests/e2e/routes.spec.js tests/e2e/back-button.spec.js tests/e2e/accessibility.spec.js tests/e2e/geometry.spec.js
scripts.test:performance-score-flow: node scripts/run-local-node.mjs --test tests/unit/performanceImproveModel.test.js && node scripts/run-local-node.mjs node_modules/@playwright/test/cli.js test tests/e2e/performance-score-flow.spec.js --workers=1 --trace=off && npm run build && git diff --check
scripts.test:subscription-conversion-no-trial: node scripts/run-local-node.mjs --test tests/unit/subscriptionNoTrial.test.js tests/unit/subscriptionGoldFocusModel.test.js && node scripts/run-local-node.mjs node_modules/@playwright/test/cli.js test tests/e2e/subscription-no-trial-flow.spec.js tests/e2e/subscription-gold-focus.spec.js --workers=1 --trace=off && npm run build && git diff --check
scripts.test:wallet-flow: node scripts/run-local-node.mjs --test tests/unit/walletCalculations.test.js && node scripts/run-local-node.mjs node_modules/@playwright/test/cli.js test tests/e2e/wallet-flow.spec.js --workers=1 --trace=off && npm run build && git diff --check
scripts.test:interactions: node scripts/run-local-node.mjs node_modules/@playwright/test/cli.js test tests/e2e/sidebar.spec.js tests/e2e/bottom-bar.spec.js tests/e2e/core-interactions.spec.js tests/e2e/navigation-contract.spec.js tests/e2e/forms-and-filters.spec.js
scripts.report:parity: node scripts/run-local-node.mjs scripts/generate-parity-report.mjs && node scripts/run-local-node.mjs scripts/report-route-contract.mjs
scripts.test:parity:core:strict: node scripts/run-local-node.mjs scripts/compare-core-visual-parity.mjs --strict && node scripts/run-local-node.mjs scripts/report-route-contract.mjs --routes=/home --strict
scripts.test:parity:strict: node scripts/run-local-node.mjs scripts/generate-parity-report.mjs && node scripts/run-local-node.mjs scripts/report-route-contract.mjs --all --strict && node scripts/run-local-node.mjs scripts/assert-v12-strict-parity.mjs
scripts.test:visual-regression:v12: node scripts/run-local-node.mjs scripts/generate-parity-report.mjs && node scripts/run-local-node.mjs scripts/assert-v12-strict-parity.mjs --visual-only
scripts.test:quality-gate:v12-c: find src tests scripts -name '*.js' -print0 2>/dev/null | xargs -0 -r -n1 node scripts/run-local-node.mjs --check && node scripts/run-local-node.mjs --test tests/architecture/*.test.js && node scripts/run-local-node.mjs node_modules/@playwright/test/cli.js test tests/e2e/v12-shell.spec.js tests/e2e/v12-home.spec.js tests/e2e/v12-jobs.spec.js tests/e2e/v12-my-jobs.spec.js tests/e2e/v12-calendar.spec.js tests/e2e/accessibility.spec.js && node scripts/run-local-node.mjs scripts/compare-core-visual-parity.mjs --strict && node scripts/run-local-node.mjs scripts/report-route-contract.mjs --routes=/home --strict && node scripts/run-local-node.mjs node_modules/vite/bin/vite.js build && git diff --check
scripts.test:design-lock: npm run test:dependency-lock && npm run test:design-contract && npm run test:quality-gate:v12-k-automated
scripts.test:v12-core: node scripts/run-local-node.mjs node_modules/@playwright/test/cli.js test tests/e2e/v12-shell.spec.js tests/e2e/v12-home.spec.js tests/e2e/v12-jobs.spec.js tests/e2e/v12-my-jobs.spec.js tests/e2e/v12-calendar.spec.js
scripts.test:v12-parity: node scripts/run-local-node.mjs scripts/generate-parity-report.mjs && node scripts/run-local-node.mjs scripts/assert-v12-parity-gate.mjs
scripts.test:quality-gate:v12: find src tests -name '*.js' -print0 2>/dev/null | xargs -0 -r -n1 node scripts/run-local-node.mjs --check && node scripts/run-local-node.mjs --test tests/architecture/*.test.js && node scripts/run-local-node.mjs node_modules/@playwright/test/cli.js test tests/e2e/v12-shell.spec.js tests/e2e/v12-home.spec.js tests/e2e/v12-jobs.spec.js tests/e2e/v12-my-jobs.spec.js tests/e2e/v12-calendar.spec.js && node scripts/run-local-node.mjs node_modules/@playwright/test/cli.js test tests/e2e/v12-compatibility.spec.js && node scripts/run-local-node.mjs scripts/generate-parity-report.mjs && node scripts/run-local-node.mjs scripts/assert-v12-parity-gate.mjs && node scripts/run-local-node.mjs node_modules/vite/bin/vite.js build && git diff --check
scripts.build: node scripts/run-local-node.mjs scripts/write-release-metadata.mjs && node scripts/run-local-node.mjs node_modules/vite/bin/vite.js build
